question: For all of the 4 cylinder cars, which model has the most horsepower?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Cylinders  =  4 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.text_1 FROM table_4 AS T1 JOIN table_5 AS T2 ON T1.text_1 = T2.fk_1 JOIN table_6 AS T3 ON T2.pk_1 = T3.pk_1 WHERE T3.num_2 = 4 ORDER BY T3.num_3 DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.text_1 FROM table_4 AS T1 JOIN table_5 AS T2 ON T1.text_1 = T2.fk_1 JOIN table_6 AS T3 ON T2.pk_1 = T3.pk_1 WHERE T3.num_2 = 4 ORDER BY T3.num_3 DESC LIMIT 1;
